questions.text:
What time do you usually get up?

I usually get up at about 7 am.

  1. I usually make dinner after work.
  2. It gives me enough time to get ready before I leave.
  3. I don't really like travelling in the evening.

Are you an early bird or a night owl?

I'm more of an early bird.

  1. I usually stay up late at weekends.
  2. I feel more awake in the morning.
  3. I don't drink coffee very often.

What do you usually do after work or university?

I normally go straight home.

  1. I usually have something to eat and relax.
  2. I don't mind getting up early.
  3. I like living near the city centre.

Do you have a regular daily routine?

Yes, I do.

  1. I usually do the same things every weekday.
  2. I enjoy going out with my friends.
  3. I don't cook very often.

How do your weekends differ from your weekdays?

They're much more relaxed.

  1. I usually sleep a bit later and have more free time.
  2. I often make breakfast before work.
  3. I don't really enjoy shopping.

Do you usually cook at home?

Yes, I cook most evenings.

  1. It's cheaper than eating out.
  2. I usually watch TV after dinner.
  3. I like reading before I go to bed.

How often do you use the kitchen?

I use it every day.

  1. I usually make breakfast and dinner there.
  2. I spend most evenings in my room.
  3. I don't like washing my car.

Do you prefer eating alone or with other people?

I prefer eating with other people.

  1. It's nicer because we can talk while we eat.
  2. I usually cook rice at home.
  3. I don't eat breakfast every day.

What do you usually do when you get home?

I usually have a shower first.

  1. Then I have something to eat.
  2. I normally leave home at eight.
  3. My favourite room is the kitchen.

Do you spend much time in your room?

Yes, I do.

  1. I usually study or watch videos there.
  2. I often meet my friends at weekends.
  3. I like listening to music in the car.
